name: Malt Shop Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened ice cream and whipped topping until well blended.
2. Reserve 8 whole Whoppers for garnish, and crush the remaining Whoppers.
3. Add 1 cup of crushed candy to the ice cream mixture; reserve the remaining 1/2 cup of crushed candy.
4. Spoon the ice cream mixture into the pie crust.
5. Top with the reserved crushed candy and freeze for 4 hours.
6. To serve, garnish with whipped topping and 8 whole Whoppers.
7. Serves 8.
